category_sources: source_facts.description says GNU typing tutor; official GNU Typist page describes it as a universal typing tutor.
display_name_sources: Official GNU Typist page and Savannah project identify the project as GNU Typist.
docs_sources: Official GNU Typist manual is published under https://www.gnu.org/software/gtypist/doc/.
repo_sources: Official Savannah GNU Typist project lists Git source-code access; Savannah Git convention provides the gtypist.git repository URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and official GNU Typist page describe a terminal typing tutor.
